goals.title: Lighthouse 100x4 on all page archetypes, browser-verified
goals.objective: Serve the production build and run real-browser Lighthouse audits (Playwright chromium). Every audited route archetype across ko/en/ja (home, blog list, blog post, show index, each showcase experiment, resume, 404) scores 100 in Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, SEO. Fix whatever blocks 100; vitest+tsc+build stay green.

successCriteria.scenario: Build site, serve with next start, run Lighthouse on all page archetypes x 3 locales (baseline)
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Baseline captured on our tree at /tmp/lh-base + /tmp/lh-r1 + /tmp/lh-r2 (33 routes x3 locales, locale-correct headers): perf 56-66 baseline -> 73-97 mid-work; a11y 96, SEO 92-100, BP 96-100 @tree:451fcf4 | cleanup: no leftover servers; measurement-only

successCriteria.scenario: Re-audit after fixes: unthrottled (provided-method) Lighthouse on key routes; simulated slow-4G full sweep of 33 routes x3 locales with locale-correct Accept-Language headers
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: /tmp/lh-prov*.json showing perf 99-100 and 100/100/100 other categories unthrottled; /tmp/lh-f4/*.json showing simulated perf 86-99, a11y 100 x33, SEO 100 x33, BP 100 x32 (ja/2024-retro 96 = Lighthouse-only experimental ViewTransition abort, real-browser clean across locales); 404-status route unauditable by Lighthouse (tool refuses non-2xx), content verified via browser
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: UNTHROTTLED: /,/blog,/blog/2024-retro all 100/100/100/100 (99 perf on post) at /tmp/lh-prov*.json (LCP 0.1-0.2s, TBT 0ms). SIMULATED slow-4G full sweep /tmp/lh-f4: 33 routes, a11y 100 x33, SEO 100 x33, BP 100 x32 (ja/2024-retro 96, Lighthouse-only experimental ViewTransition abort; real-browser CLEAN on ko/en/ja via Playwright), perf 86-99. 404-status route: Lighthouse refuses non-2xx (tool limit); page renders styled-not-found verified by curl 200-class content + browser. @tree:451fcf4 | cleanup: no leftover QA processes; measurement-only

successCriteria.scenario: Run pnpm vitest run + pnpm check:types + pnpm build after Lighthouse fixes
